item.title: You’re not alone
item.description:
You’re not alone
You’re not alone
Suicide is the leading cause for Australians aged 15 to 44. Traffic accidents also are in the top three causes of death for young Australians. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2023-09-27/abs-deaths-in-graphs-covid-heart-disease-suicide/102907992 Men’s helpline Australia 1300789978 You’re not alone Edit: thank you all for upvoting for awareness - pls repost
item.dc:creator: thebansheee

item.title: Pixie and Brutus: Translator
item.description:
Pixie & Brutus by Pet_Foolery
Source: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/pixie-and-brutus/list?title_no=452175&page=1
His comic can also be found at https://www.patreon.com/petfoolery/
No bigfoot in this one
But did you find the queen?
Bonus video (NOT my dog/cat, just a cute video I saw on here and re-posted so you all can see how cute they are together)
And bonus picture because it is so cute
item.dc:creator: RuneClaw

item.title: Low Battery (Comic)
item.description: Hope you guys enjoy this comic! I wanted to make it about how maybe some people seem to have their lives together, when actually pretty much everyone needs their own time to restore their battery. For me personally I get burned out pretty quickly even from seemingly fun things like seeing friends etc. That’s why maybe if you’re drained it’s time to take a break for yourself. A REAL break where it’s just you and what you love. Obviously it’s easier said than done if you have family to look after, an intense job, health problems that may restrict you, or lots of commitments, but for those who do, I hope you can take time to take care of you! The wips for this comic are on my new patreon: miaminicomics! Not to be mistaken with the 18+patreon. Insta: miaminicomics
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Have A Pocket
item.description:
I used to laugh at this kind of thing until I brought an apron from home to work. One of my cooks complimented my apron and, immediately... Well... You know what I did and said.
Please show my food blog some love: https://rouxedfood.com/ Any donation helps! https://ko-fi.com/rouxedfood?ref=onboarding_email_founderwelcome
